downloads.title: CPRE Foundation Level Syllabus v3.2.0 (English)
downloads.why: Primary reference for validating chapter structure, learning objectives, and content scope. Used because the English v3.3.0 was not yet published at the time of download; v3.2 to v3.3 changes are layout/typo fixes only (no structural changes).

downloads.title: CPRE Foundation Level Syllabus v3.0.1 (English)
downloads.why: Secondary reference to compare against the initial v3 release and verify that the 7-EU structure was present from the start of the v3 lineage.

downloads.title: CPRE Foundation Level Practice Exam Set_Public_EN_v3.3.1
downloads.why: Official practice exam used to verify exam format (45 questions, 70 points, A/P/K types), question distribution across 7 EUs, and validate repo's exam-tips accuracy.

downloads.title: IREB CPRE Glossary v2.2.0 (English)
downloads.why: Official glossary used to create the v3.3.0 glossary page with verbatim term definitions. 215 terms extracted and parsed into the searchable glossary component.

notes: Text-extracted versions (.txt) are saved alongside each PDF for future reference. The v3.3.0 German syllabus was available at cockpit-v1.ireb.org but the English v3.3.0 was not publicly accessible at the time of this validation.
